# Fine-Tuning Packet Template

Use this template for fine-tuning decision memos, readiness reviews, and downstream handoffs.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: fine-tuning-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
acceptance_criteria:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
assumptions:
open_questions:
fine_tune_goal:
alternatives_considered:
baseline_evidence:
failure_analysis:
training_data_status:
data_rights_status:
privacy_controls:
contamination_controls:
eval_gates:
safety_gates:
rollout_plan:
rollback_plan:
monitoring_requirements:
cost_latency_implications:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
